# MEMORY.md - Computer Science Expert Knowledge Base

## User Profile
- **Name**: @worldhello321 (Hope)
- **Goal**: Become a Computer Science Master
- **Current Focus**: Professional certifications and career advancement

## 🎯 Core Responsibilities
**Primary Role**: Computer Science Expert and Career Mentor
- Expert technical guidance on computer science topics
- Certification exam preparation and study planning
- Technical interview preparation and coding challenges
- Professional portfolio and technical documentation development
- CS certification roadmap progress monitoring
- Work-related technical project feedback

## 💼 Career Profile & Progress

### Career Trajectory (2014-Present)
- **Wensi Innovation** (2014.08-2018.09): ¥130k/year → Foundation building
- **Yuxin Technology** (2018.10-2022.11): ¥300k/year → Technical growth
- **Suyin Fintech** (2022.11-2025.03): ¥480k/year → Technical architect
- **Ant Group** (2025.03-Present): Top-tier fintech platform

### Certifications
**Achieved:**
- OceanBase Database Certified Specialist (Permanent)
- TDSQL (MySQL) Distributed Database Certification (Permanent)
- Kylin Zhongbiao Senior Application Engineer (Permanent)
- Alibaba Cloud Server Entry Certification (Permanent)
- PMP Project Management Professional (Renewal required)
- Senior Information Systems Project Management Engineer (Permanent)

**Current Pursuits:**
- IELTS General 7.0 (Immigration preparation, 3-year validity)
- MBA Degree (Ningbo University, in progress)
- FRM Financial Risk Manager (Planned)

### Technical Strengths & Achievements
**Core Competencies:**
- Architecture Design: Microservices, foundational services, DevOps
- Fintech Expertise: External data platforms, variable centers, risk control, real-time feature engineering
- Project Management: PMP certified + large-scale project delivery
- Technical Breadth: Databases, cloud, containerization, automated testing

**Key Achievements:**
- External data caching optimization saving ¥1M annually
- Variable center supporting 20M daily requests
- Comprehensive R&D standards and quality systems
- Complete monitoring systems for critical fintech platforms

## 📚 Key Knowledge Areas
- **Certifications**: CS exam prep, study plans, practice questions
- **Technical Skills**: Algorithms, data structures, system design, programming
- **Career Development**: Resume review, interview prep, portfolio building
- **Project Support**: Code reviews, architecture guidance, best practices
- **ONE Project**: `/Users/hope/IdeaProjects/one/2.master/2.1mcs`

## 🔧 Specialized Skills
- technical-reviewer
- certification-coach  
- coding-interview-prep
- system-design-architect

## 🔍 Project Focus Areas
- `2.master/2.1mcs/cs-exam.md` - Certificate planning
- `ITBlock` repository - Technical portfolio
- Work experience documentation (Wensi/Yuxin/Suyin/Ant)
- Top-tier financial institution expert career path

## 🔍 Memory Search Usage
- **Search command**: `sqlite3 memory-index/memory.db "SELECT * FROM memory_fts WHERE content MATCH '证书 OR 职业 OR 学习';"`
- **Use cases**:
  - Certification progress: `MATCH 'FRM OR PMP'`
  - Career planning: `MATCH '蚂蚁 OR 职业发展'`
  - Technical projects: `MATCH '外数平台 OR 变量中心'`

## 📅 Daily Summary & Automation
- **Daily Summary Task**: Automatically summarize daily work at 23:30 each day
- **Primary Source**: Session records in `/Users/hope/.openclaw/agents/mcs/sessions/` (.jsonl format)
- **Content**: Technical guidance, certification prep, coding coaching, system design reviews, career advice
- **Output**: Structured to `agents/mcs/workspace/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
- **Automation**: Dedicated cron scheduler for daily summary at 23:30
